known_failure_modes: Can hide path risk and leverage

formula_or_definition: annualized mean return divided by annualized volatility
known_failure_modes: Sensitive to non-normal returns and stale prices

formula_or_definition: CAGR divided by absolute max drawdown
known_failure_modes: Unstable when drawdown is tiny or sample is short

formula_or_definition: share of positive daily strategy returns
known_failure_modes: Can be high for poor payoff asymmetry

formula_or_definition: mean absolute target-weight change per bar

known_failure_modes: Does not capture factor or beta exposure

formula_or_definition: non-null feature observations divided by total observations
known_failure_modes: High coverage does not guarantee decomposition correctness

formula_or_definition: slope of decomposed pair spread trend
direction: closer to zero is preferred for residual pair trades
known_failure_modes: Low slope does not prove cointegration; structural breaks can be delayed

formula_or_definition: rolling correlation of pair leg returns
direction: higher is usually preferred for pair eligibility
known_failure_modes: Correlation can remain high while hedge spread mean drifts

formula_or_definition: ranked trend, trend-strength, cycle, residual, volume and stability components
direction: higher ranked assets receive more weight
known_failure_modes: Rank score is relative and can concentrate in one factor/regime

formula_or_definition: whether non-zero volume exists for decomposition filters
known_failure_modes: FX tutorial exports have zero volume; live OHLCV assets usually have usable volume
